### **Publication BibTeX**

You can either:

- [ ] add a link to the [PubMed Publication](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37108605/)
- [ ] Paste the BibTeX into a codeblock below ([generator](https://www.underleaf.ai/tools/pubmed-to-bibtex))
- [ ] Upload the BibTeX file directly as part of the issue.

```bib

```
